name: Prince Edward Island
_note_surtax: PEI eliminated its surtax when it moved to the 5-bracket system in 2024. No surtax applies for 2025.

probate._type_note: PEI uses $400 flat for first $100K, then $4/$1K above. Using flat_tiers type with a special ratePerThousandAbove field for the top tier.
probate._note: PEI Probate Act Fees Regulations EC200/12. $400 for first $100K; $4 per $1,000 above $100K.

intestacy._note: PEI Probate Act Part IV governs intestacy. Older statute, no preferential share equivalent. Values approximate — legal review recommended.
